accent_strategy.description: One faint vermilion beacon with slight atmospheric pulse.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A weighty ultramarine monolith occupying the right third as the stable architectural mass.

historical_anchor.description: A launch stack kept nearly static so the frame reads as a restrained witness rather than spectacle.

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Keep the frame almost locked, letting only atmosphere and reflection carry the motion.

reflection_strategy.description: A calm mirrored launch-pad plane with restrained surface movement.

subject_anchor.description: A pale shuttle stack silhouette held nearly static against the field.

surreal_breach.description: The cold boundary feels too heavy for the sky while the shuttle remains still.
